meaning: vt.(发往各邮局前)按邮政编码预先分拣(邮件)
examples: Whether it's one big hamper with three sections or three different hampers lined up, it doesn't matter as long as you can use it to presort your laundry.
Customers are requested to presort mail items meeting the above conditions according to the requirements of "Bulk Air Mail" service, If the mail items are not.
The forestage of the fusion model completes target presort and its post-stage is used to multi-period uncertainty inference and the whole set distribution of probability.
